name: Do I need a lawyer for a Perplexity content theft claim or can I DIY?
description: Lawyer essential for suits; DIY notices only.[1]

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer for a Perplexity content theft claim or can I DIY?

acceptedAnswer.text: Lawyer essential for suits; DIY notices only.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: DIY possible for notices/DMCA takedowns, but lawsuits require lawyers for complexity like fair use fights.[1] NYT's multi-count suit shows need for IP expertise.[1] Key factors: damages sought, jurisdiction battles.[6] Use small claims for low stakes; retain counsel for injunctions. Pros boost win odds significantly.
